conclusion: HO EC-3 top-5 (0.6235) is below the nominal threshold of 0.65 but passes within +/-0.05 tolerance (effective threshold 0.60). HO EC-3 MRR (0.6187) passes the nominal 0.50 threshold. HO/IS MRR ratio (0.6626) has correct direction (< 1) and passes the acceptance reference (>= 0.65 with tolerance), but is below the expected range lower bound 0.70. v2 leak-fix applied. Results support cross-class EC-family transfer under teacher tolerance.
